description: The Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) is the primary foreign intelligence service of the United States government. In the context of Iranian history, the CIA played a decisive role in the [1953 Iranian coup d'état](/events/iranian-coup-1953), orchestrating Operation Ajax (alongside Britain's MI6) to overthrow the democratically-elected government of Prime Minister Mohammad Mossadegh and restore [Mohammad Reza Shah Pahlavi](/people/mohammad-reza-shah-pahlavi) to full power. The agency subsequently assisted in the creation and training of [SAVAK](/orgs/savak), Iran's secret police, in 1957. The CIA's role in the coup was officially acknowledged by the US government in 2013 with the declassification of relevant documents.
editorial_notes: CIA role in 1953 coup officially acknowledged by US in 2013. Helped establish and train SAVAK. Operation Ajax = US codename; Operation Boot = UK codename.
